subcodes.first_line: O Zayn! Upon thee be My glory. The honored Hají Ghulám-'Alí, upon him be My Glory, hath arrived and the dues sent have been received [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا زین علیک بهائی جناب حاجی غلامعلی علیه بهائی وارد حقوق مرسله رسید بسیار
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @personal instructions, @praise and encouragement, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
